candidates.why: Direct total current assets line on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the preferred reported total.
Noncurrent assets, not current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line; preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash, but CHE should come from the balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period
candidates.why: Beginning cash, not the balance-sheet cash target.
Operating cash flow, not cash balance.

Despite the wording, values align with total current liabilities (includes trade payables, tax payables, contract liabilities, other current liabilities, short-term borrowings, lease liabilities). Best match for total current liabilities.
Only one component of current liabilities, not the total.
Balancing line, not a reported total.
Not total current liabilities.

variables.notes: Chosen outside the shortlist because it clearly represents the reported total current liabilities subtotal in this statement layout.

candidates.why: This appears to be total current liabilities, not just short-term interest-bearing debt, so it is too broad for STD.
Represents current maturities of long-term debt, which is relevant to STD, but may not capture all short-term borrowings and can overlap with a cleaner total if available.
Direct short-term interest-bearing debt line on the balance sheet; best clean match for STD and excludes lease liabilities.

variables.notes: Preferred the clean current interest-bearing debt line and excluded lease liabilities. Did not include 'LT Debt Maturing within 1 Year' to avoid potential double counting.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Direct reported line for property, plant and equipment / tangible fixed assets; best match for total/net PPE.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Lease right-of-use assets are not the preferred total PPE measure when a broader tangible fixed assets line exists.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Accumulated Depreciation
candidates.why: Contra-account, not PPE total.
Intangibles, not PPE.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total tangible fixed assets line as net PPE.

candidates.why: Direct total assets line.
Direct operating cash flow line with reported values; best match for net cash from operating activities.
Semantically also a good match, but preview shows blanks while a populated direct operating cash flow line exists.

candidates.row_label: Net cash flow from change in working capital
candidates.why: Only a component of operating cash flow, not total OANCF.

variables.notes: Used the populated operating cash flow total line.
